{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231815255FD56E72D159E147C8D5"}"},"total":512},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7464215900892758809","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大写的不错，没有把男主写的娇娇软软，打奶嗝的那种。而且角度新颖，第一次看男主攻略女主的快穿，而且女主属于权利上位，也没有写女尊世界背景（如果是女尊背景的话，不可避免会将男主弱化、娘化或者说驯化，女主的强大和地位就成了社会背景的“规定”了，女主强势反压男主就没有什么爽点了）","text_exts":[{"e":68,"s":64,"text":"女尊世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A5%B3%E5%B0%8A%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774260925E147C8D5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227464215900892758809%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227449043767039888446%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A5%B3%E5%B0%8A%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737901741,"group_id":"7449043767039888446","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny5nr6IQMTD7Um4O9Krj0VPLN2h4NJdeq3oaL+NXRse/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ca93dfbdcfb541ee90c137567be761f8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790159&x-signature=Ib6nc7vnPTFuTVsxzGrxB0%2BsXWQ%3D","user_id":"1706038296840551","user_name":"安若十三"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1706038296840551","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449043767039888446","book_info":{"abstract":"（考究党和无脑爽文控慎入）女频快穿文（伪强制）男主视角，主角为男的攻略文，女强男装弱，魅魔顾随安善于洞察人心，千层套路攻略女主，看似攻略女主，实则引诱女主主动，高端猎人常常以猎物的形式出现。
善于伪装钓系男魅魔VS偏执疯狂切片女反派
一开始，她想拉神明下神坛，想让白莲染淤泥，后来她亲手铸神坛，造神格，只为让那白莲稳坐高台，她甘愿终身侍奉。
“顾随安是这个世界上最温柔，最善良，最纯真无邪的存在，他集世间美好于一身。”
“顾随安是月亮，温和而不会灼伤任何人，皎皎如月，但我却想要拥月入怀。”
想要得到我的爱，就拿你百分之百的真心来换吧！-顾随安
清冷公子×偏执摄政王
天上人间男模×千金大小姐
正道高岭之花×魔道妖女
白月光替身男友×霸道女总裁
男扮女装公主×女扮男装将军

isten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6878,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":17390},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1737902413,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7493739503623717657","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我又来了，已经完全爱上这本书了，保持这样的风格，不失忆，不降智，好饿，作者饭饭"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744861432,"group_id":"7449043767039888446","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2047751840864188"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449043767039888446","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"255"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26217,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7465955044221616921","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"希望作者一直保持下去这种风格，不恋爱脑，有甜有虐，有演技，攻略同时付出三分真心，可能是因为我个人原因，我比较喜欢在感情中站据高地，看着别人非我（他）不可的样子，这本书完全踩在了我的xP上，希望是无固定CP，但每个世界有CP，千万千万不要有失忆梗，不然我会很失望的，保持这样的风格和人设，祝作者这本书爆火"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738425300,"group_id":"7449043767039888446","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3uyMbbUk4mMrMaFyb7odGG3wzxwdrBrjsbNtTWhpbdg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/31798f7b9d43432ebae30dc868e5aa0f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792613&x-signature=VGi20o9UTLmzWy8ucD%2BrsThlap0%3D","user_id":"2047751840864188","user_name":"20刚好"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2047751840864188","user_relati
